packets.name: Bootstrap & Schema
packets.notes: 38/38 tests pass. Validated 2026-03-10. Schema matches spec exactly (all 6 tables, all columns, all FKs verified). Column tests added for all tables during validation.

packets.name: Git Quick Scan
packets.notes: 23/23 tests pass. 61/61 full suite passes. Validated 2026-03-10. All 8 acceptance criteria verified. Porcelain parsing covers MM/AM/D/UU. Empty repo handling confirmed. No scope creep.

packets.name: Repo Discovery & Registration API
packets.notes: 17/17 tests pass. 78/78 full suite passes. Validated 2026-03-10. All 11 acceptance criteria verified. discover_repos, detect_runtime, generate_repo_id, get_default_branch, register_repo, get_db dependency, GET/POST /api/repos, DELETE /api/repos/{id}, --scan CLI flag. CASCADE delete tested. Submodule dedup tested. No scope creep.

packets.name: Fleet API & Quick Scan Orchestration
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 8/8 packet tests pass, 86/86 full suite passes. All 10 acceptance criteria verified. scan_fleet_quick with asyncio.Semaphore(8), working_state upsert, GET /api/fleet with full response shape. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: HTML Shell & Design System
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 10/10 packet tests pass, 96/96 full suite passes. All 13 acceptance criteria verified. Full CSS design system (46 vars matching §5.2), CDN tags pinned (React 18.2.0, ReactDOM 18.2.0, Babel 7.23.9, Recharts 2.12.7), React shell with ErrorBoundary, hash routing, NavTabs with sliding underline, Header with buttons, ContentArea placeholders. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Fleet Overview UI
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 14/14 packet tests pass, 110/110 full suite passes. All 17 acceptance criteria verified. FleetOverview with KpiRow (6 cards, conditional coloring), GridControls (custom SortDropdown + FilterInput), ProjectCard (3-row with RuntimeBadge, StatusPills, DepBadge, SparklineOverlay), EmptyState. Freshness at 7/30/90 days. Filter-then-sort client-side. Null safety confirmed for timeAgo, freshness, dep_summary, empty sparkline. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Git Full History Scan
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 15/15 packet tests pass, 125/125 full suite passes. Critical fix: format string used literal \x00 (crashes subprocess) → changed to %x00 (git format escape). Regression guard added. All 15 acceptance criteria verified. parse_git_log, aggregate_daily_stats, scan_full_history, upsert_daily_stats, run_full_history_scan all correct. No scope creep.

packets.name: Branch Scan
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 13/13 packet tests pass, 138/138 full suite passes. All 13 acceptance criteria verified. STALE_THRESHOLD_DAYS=30, _is_stale, parse_branches, scan_branches, upsert_branches, run_branch_scan. DELETE+INSERT upsert in single transaction. %x00 git format escape (not literal \x00). Boundary test uses 30d-1s margin. CASCADE test with PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Full Scan Orchestration & SSE
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 16/16 packet tests pass, 154/154 full suite passes. All 16 acceptance criteria verified. Tests strengthened during validation: added DB guard 409 test (server-restart scenario), empty fleet test (0 repos → completed), and finished_at assertion on failure path. POST /api/fleet/scan with Literal type validation, dual 409 guard (_active_scan_id + DB), asyncio.create_task background launch. SSE endpoint via StreamingResponse + asyncio.Queue bridge. run_fleet_scan sequential loop with continue-on-error. type='deps' no-op. Fleet endpoint branch_count/stale_branch_count from branches table. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Go / Rust / Ruby / PHP Dep Health
packets.notes: May split into 15A-15D if ecosystems prove complex during implementation.
